title: Asholei ki kumir bhoyonkor, ar asholei ki kukur kono gaali? Thik ajaan er shomoy...
description: Asholei ki kumir bhoyonkor, ar asholei ki kukur kono gaali? Thik ajaan er shomoy howa ei ghotona ta theke onek kichu amader bujhar ase ekhono. Onek kichu mathay process korar ase. Onek kichu bukey chepe shojho korar ase. Eita amader reality. Ekta desh bhora shudhu murkho, jaahil, omanush.

title: This video has been deleted as a breach of agreement by the agency (Stackmist) w...
description: This video has been deleted as a breach of agreement by the agency (Stackmist) which runs under Asiatic. However brownfish media has no clash with the brand directly. The brand can contact agency for further explanation if required. We would like to clarify that our team holds no responsibility of what the agency has to say. We have received the advance payment and completed the deliverables. Hope there are no confusions. We have also black listed stackmist from any future work.
